cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card and move up to 3 spaces. 
If you are playing this card because of your Special ability, choose a STUNT card in your discard pile and add it to your hand, in addition to the other ability.
cards.title:
Stunt - 
Railroad Tie Tossing

cards.basicText: Move your fighter up to 4 spaces he may move through opposing fighters. If you are playing this card because of your Special ability, deal 1 damage for each opposing fighter moved through.
cards.title: Stunt - Runaway Motorcycle

cards.basicText: Move every fighter in your zone up to 2 spaces, and they take 1 damage, but you take 2 damage. If you are playing this card because of your Special ability, you take no damage.
cards.title:
Stunt - 
The Water Spout

cards.basicText: Deal 2 damage to every fighter adjacent to you. If you are playing this card because of your Special ability, deal 3 damage instead.
cards.title:
Stunt - 
Falling House

cards.basicText: You may move up to 3 spaces away from the nearest opponent, that opponent discards 2 cards, but you take 2 damage.
cards.title:
Stunt - 
Grabbing a Moving Car

cards.basicText: Move to a space in the farthest zone away from you.
cards.title:
Stunt - 
Building to Building Jump

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, draw 2 cards.
cards.title: Deadpan Expression

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, put your BOOSTED STUNT back in your hand if you BOOSTED.
cards.duringText: You may BOOST this card with a STUNT card.
cards.title: Steamboat bill, JR

cards.afterText: Deal damage equal to the BOOST value of your most recently played STUNT card in your discard pile.
cards.title: "Tragedy is a close-up; comedy, a long shot."

cards.afterText: You and your opponent reveal a random card from your hand. Whose ever BOOST value is higher, take damage equal to the BOOST value, and put that card back in their hand. The other player discards their card.
cards.title: The Cameraman

cards.afterText: Recover health equal to the number of scheme cards in the opposing fighter's discard pile.
cards.title: Sherlock, Jr.

cards.duringText: If Buster Keaton started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: Writer, Actor, and Director

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, put this card back in your hand.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: The Great stone face

cards.afterText: Gain any 2 STUNT cards from your discard pile and shuffle them in your deck.
cards.title: death-defying stunts
one of the greatest comic actors of all time

cards.afterText: You may draw a card and gain an action, or you may take any one STUNT card from your discard pile and put it in your hand.
cards.title: Porkpie Hat

hero.name: Buster Keaton
hero.specialAbility:
AFTER COMBAT:
If you won the combat, you may play a STUNT card.

This effects can not be canceled and goes first if your card also has an AFTER COMBAT effect.

ruleCards.content: At the beginning of the game, draw cards until you draw a STUNT card, then shuffle all of the other cards. Then draw 4 cards, so you have 1 STUNT card and 4 different cards.
ruleCards.title: At the start of Game

name: Buster Keaton
note: Buster Keaton was an American actor, director, and filmmaker regarded as one of the greatest and most innovative comic geniuses of the silent film era. Nicknamed "The Great Stone Face," he was known for his deadpan expression, virtuosic physical comedy, and ambitious, death-defying stunts, all of which continue to influence filmmakers and comedians today.
